title: Wire Graphiti MCP server into a client repo
userStory: As a user, I want Claude Code in any of my project repos to read from the brain via MCP so that mcp__graphiti__* tools are available there.
acceptanceCriteria: Client repo's .mcp.json adds an entry for graphiti pointing at https://brain.${BRAIN_DOMAIN}/mcp with Authorization: Bearer ${BRAIN_BEARER_TOKEN}
Client repo's CLAUDE.md (or equivalent doc) notes that BRAIN_DOMAIN and BRAIN_BEARER_TOKEN must be exported in the shell before launching claude (env interpolation requirement)

Verify: in a fresh Claude Code session in that repo, prompt 'list the available MCP tools' returns mcp__graphiti__search_nodes, mcp__graphiti__search_facts, mcp__graphiti__add_memory (and the rest of Graphiti's MCP tool surface)
blockedReason: Cannot write into a different repo's .claude/ from this session (harness denies as out-of-scope self-modification). Install kit lives at templates/claude-code-client/INSTALL.md; user copies the snippets into their client repo manually.
